original_question: Regina wrote 9 novels last year. If this is 3 quarters of the number of novels she has written this year, how many novels has she written this year? Let's think step by step and output the final answer after "####".

similar_questions.question: Alex wrote 12 poems last year. If this is 4 quarters of the number of poems he has written this year, how many poems has he written this year?
Samantha painted 15 landscapes last year. If this is 5 quarters of the number of landscapes she has painted this year, how many landscapes has she painted this year?
Jordan completed 6 art projects last year. If this is 2 quarters of the number of art projects he has completed this year, how many art projects has he completed this year?
Liam composed 18 songs last year. If this is 6 quarters of the number of songs he has composed this year, how many songs has he composed this year?
Ella wrote 10 short stories last year. If this is 2 quarters of the number of short stories she has written this year, how many short stories has she written this year?
